steps.expected: Forest::from_tensions(empty) produces forest with zero roots and zero nodes
steps.observed: test_empty_forest passed - forest.is_empty() true, len=0, root_count=0

steps.action: Verify traverse functions on empty forest
steps.expected: Empty traversals return no nodes
steps.observed: test_traverse_empty_forest passed - DFS pre/post and BFS all return empty

evidence.testOutput:
test tree::tests::test_empty_forest ... ok
test tree::tests::test_traverse_empty_forest ... ok

steps.expected: One tension with no parent produces single-root forest with zero children
steps.observed: test_single_root passed - forest.len()=1, root_count=1, node found by ID

steps.expected: Multiple tensions with null parent_id produce multi-root forest
steps.observed: test_multiple_roots passed - 3 tensions produce forest with len=3, root_count=3, all parent_id()=None

steps.expected: Tensions with parent_id correctly form parent-child edges, children accessible from parent, parent accessible from child
steps.observed: test_parent_child_relationship passed - parent has one child in children vec, child.parent_id() returns parent ID, root_count=1

steps.expected: Chain A->B->C->D produces tree with depth 4, each node has correct parent and children
steps.observed: test_deep_hierarchy passed - depth(A)=0, depth(B)=1, depth(C)=2, depth(D)=3, root_count=1 with root='A'

steps.expected: Tensions with no parent and no children appear as isolated root nodes
steps.observed: test_loose_tensions passed - loose tension has parent_id=None, children.is_empty(), appears as root

steps.expected: Tension with parent_id pointing to non-existent id is treated as root
steps.observed: test_orphan_handling passed - orphan with parent_id='nonexistent' becomes root (root_count=1, root_ids[0]='orphan')

steps.expected: Self-references (A->A) are detected and rejected with TreeError::SelfReference
steps.observed: test_self_reference_rejected passed - returns Err(TreeError::SelfReference('self'))

steps.expected: Circular parent chains (A->B->C->A) are detected and rejected with TreeError::CircularReference
steps.observed: test_circular_reference_rejected passed - returns Err with cycle description containing '->'

steps.expected: Longer cycles (A->B->C->D->A) are also detected
steps.observed: test_circular_reference_longer_chain passed - returns Err

evidence.testOutput:
test tree::tests::test_self_reference_rejected ... ok
test tree::tests::test_circular_reference_rejected ... ok
test tree::tests::test_circular_reference_longer_chain ... ok

steps.expected: DFS pre-order visits node before children
steps.observed: test_dfs_pre_order_single_root passed - order: A, B, D, C for tree with A(root)->[B,C], B->D

steps.expected: DFS pre-order across all roots visits in root order
steps.observed: test_dfs_pre_order_multiple_roots passed - order: A, B, X, Y for two separate trees

steps.expected: DFS post-order visits children before node
steps.observed: test_dfs_post_order_single_root passed - order: D, B, C, A for tree with A(root)->[B,C], B->D

steps.expected: BFS visits level by level
steps.observed: test_bfs_single_root passed - order: A, B, C, D (A at level 0, B/C at level 1, D at level 2)

steps.expected: BFS across all roots visits roots first then children
steps.observed: test_bfs_multiple_roots passed - order: A, X, B, Y (roots first, then their children)

evidence.testOutput:
test tree::tests::test_dfs_pre_order_single_root ... ok
test tree::tests::test_dfs_pre_order_multiple_roots ... ok
test tree::tests::test_dfs_post_order_single_root ... ok
test tree::tests::test_bfs_single_root ... ok
test tree::tests::test_bfs_multiple_roots ... ok

steps.expected: subtree(node_id) on root returns tree with all descendants
steps.observed: test_subtree_root passed - subtree('A') has len=4, root_count=1, includes all descendants

steps.expected: subtree on internal node returns tree rooted at that node with all descendants
steps.observed: test_subtree_internal_node passed - subtree('B') has len=2 (B and D), excludes parent A and sibling C

steps.expected: Subtree of leaf returns single node
steps.observed: test_subtree_leaf passed - subtree('B') on leaf returns len=1, root='B'

steps.observed: test_subtree_unknown_node passed - returns None for 'unknown' on empty forest
